content: Clerk Android v1.0.31 (clerk-android-api). Gradle dep: implementation('com.clerk:clerk-android-api:1.0.31'). Init in Application.onCreate(): Clerk.initialize(this, publishableKey = 'pk_test_...'). publishable key via buildConfigField in build.gradle.kts. iOS ClerkKit: Swift Package Manager, URL https://github.com/clerk/clerk-ios. Call Clerk.configure(publishableKey: 'pk_test_...') at app launch. pk_test_ for dev, pk_live_ for production. API keys (pk_*) are NOT secrets — safe in source/buildConfigField. Secret keys (sk_*) must never be committed.
